     abstract — "I'm building X, the engine forces me to do Y,
     which costs Z" beats "holt should have W". -->

     fine for an issue. -->

## Why this fits holt

<!-- holt is a single-node, embedded **metadata engine** for
     path-shaped keys (see ROADMAP's "Not on the roadmap" for
     what's explicitly out). If your request is closer to "S3
     server", "distributed coordinator", or "general KV store",
     please confirm it still belongs in holt's scope before we
     dig in. -->
